task_objective: High Fashion Photography Reference Sheet Creation

character_reference.description: Preserve facial features, hair, skin tone, and body proportions

outfit_reference.description: Preserve clothing cut, fabric texture, pattern, and accessories

workflow.role: Senior Fashion Photography Director and Prompt Expert

steps.step_1_character_analysis: Analyze character identity from Reference Image 2 with strict precision.
steps.step_2_outfit_analysis: Extract outfit details, fabric textures, and accessories from Reference Image 1.
steps.step_3_lighting_extraction: Extract lighting atmosphere and setting from Reference Image 1.

step_4_prompt_generation.instruction: Create a comprehensive prompt for a 2x2 grid layout with four distinct views, merging character identity from Image 2 with outfit from Image 1, while maintaining lighting from Image 1.

constraints.panel_layout: 2x2 grid with strict separation: Top-Left (0 degrees front view), Top-Right (90 degrees left profile), Bottom-Left (270 degrees right profile), Bottom-Right (180 degrees back view)
constraints.quality: Professional photography, sharp focus, 4k resolution, highly detailed fabric texture, realistic lighting
constraints.consistency: Consistent character identity and identical clothing details across all views

final_execution: Generate a high-fidelity 2x2 grid layout containing four distinct and independent panels as specified, ensuring seamless fusion of character identity, outfit details, and lighting atmosphere.
